text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Valentine's Day, and everyone's hearts are
aflutter...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like good friends, it's common for
Umamusume and their trainers to exchange gifts
as a symbol of their bond... under normal
circumstances, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship doesn't do normal. It would be best not
to expect business as usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, I've brought some chocolate for her, just to
be on the safe side.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Giving it to her after training should be enough to
make this feel like Valentine's Day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or at least, that's what I thought...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only does Gold Ship not show up for training,
she's still nowhere to be seen by the time sunset
rolls around.
choice_data_list: I hope she hasn't gotten into trouble...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Getting worried, I pull out my phone to call her,
when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... bzzzt...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Peace, peace! ☆ Golshi here! ☆ I haven't seen you
all day. You alive?
choice_data_list: I should be asking you that!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa... You don't beat around the bush, do you?
Sorry, I had a little something to take care of.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm out on the water right now.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The high seas, matey! Where else would you find
a Ship?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But whew! Catching a decent-sized red sea bream
sure took a while.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'll have it ready for dinner soon. Wait for me,
'kay? Later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Talk about out of the blue... It looks like all I can
do is wait.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm back!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Look at you! If you had a tail, I bet you'd be
wagging it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sorry if I worried ya. But I hope you'll agree... that
this is worth the wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Here we go! One red sea bream, fresh-caught and
ready to eat!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Today's Valentine's, right? Here's a little
something to show my appreciation. Thanks,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flop, flop!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Of all the things you could question here, you
pick that?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The thing just wouldn't die, so I didn't bother
gutting it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I figure I've done my part by this point, so I'll
leave the rest to you! Slice it up nice and neat,
wouldja?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up taking the fish to the cafeteria and
letting a professional prepare it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It makes for delicious sashimi.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But good golly did I catch a big-un. Now hurry'n
get yer butt over here.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'll be waiting by the shore. Later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Beep, beep...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've got no idea what's going on, but it sounds
like I'd better head for the beach!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, over here! What kept you?
choice_data_list: What are you doing out here?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Today's Valentine's Day. Haven't you
heard?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: And you know what that means... Voila!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She pushes something into my hands so suddenly
that I almost drop it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Here, for you! It's sea bream sashimi. Fresh,
tender, and delicious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nothing makes sense anymore. For lack of
anything better to do, I look up at the sky.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I'm stuffed! That was some mighty good
sea bream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This Valentine's Day was anything but normal...
but I did get to eat some great sashimi.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to thank Gold Ship for going out of her
way to catch and prepare it for me.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What, you got me something, too? A real sucker
for protocol, huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, it looks like we both got each other gifts.
Heh, I knew I was right to go with the sea bream.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh? Gonna ask straight up? Want a peek at
Golshi's heart, do you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know how flowers have symbols and
meanings and yadda yadda yadda? Well, so do
fish.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: And red sea bream means...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Actually, y'know what? I'm not gonna tell you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen once told me that a lady always knows
what cards to keep to her chest.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So if you wanna know, you're just gonna have to
find out yourself! Later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Valentine's Day with Gold Ship sure was a
rollercoaster ride, but I had fun... I think.
